topic: 200-day SMA as support on SPY daily — does it hold up statistically?
summary: The video tests whether the 200-day SMA acts as reliable support on SPY daily. The presenter defines the trigger as a close within 1% above the 200 SMA, measures the 10-day forward return, and reports 73% positive rate over 52 occurrences across a 5-year lookback (Jan 2019–Dec 2023). Caveats around bull-market bias are acknowledged explicitly.
